zh.lifeSummary: 當Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly於大約1148年出生在威爾士卡馬特史爾時，他的父親Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII44歲，母親Alice Montgomery47歲。他於大約1189年與Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他在愛爾蘭被列為chief justice of ireland。他去世於1204年1月15日在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達享年57歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 奧法利艾登德利吉爾達。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly于大约1148年出生在威尔士卡馬特史爾时，他的父亲Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII44岁，母亲Alice Montgomery47岁。他于大约1189年与Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他在爱尔兰被列为chief justice of ireland。他去世于1204年1月15日在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達享年57岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 奧法利艾登德利吉爾達。

nameMeanings.name: FitzMaurice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Ciaran, Colm.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Maurice (see Morris 1), ‘son of Maurice’. This surname is common in Ireland, where it has also been Gaelicized as Mac Muiris. The Irish family of Fitzmaurice share a common Norman ancestry with the Fitzgerald family. They can be traced to Thomas Fitzmaurice, whose brother Gerald was the ancestor of the Irish Fitzgerald dynasty. Their father was Maurice Fitzgerald, a Norman baron (died 1176).

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Gerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + wald ‘rule’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. There has been some confusion with Gerard . It died out in England at the end of the 13th century. However, it continued to be popular in Ireland, where it had been brought in the 12th century at the time of Strongbow's invasion. It was used in England in the 17th century and revived in the 19th century, along with several other long-extinct names of Norman, Old English, and Celtic origin, and is now more common than Gerard, which survived all along as an English ‘gentry’ name.

variants.name: Jerrold
meanings: Rare variant of   Gerald  , probably a transferred use of the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.description: Arrival of Normans at Baginbun in Co. Wexford thus started 800 year struggle between English and Irish.

en.lifeSummary: When Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly was born about 1148, in Carmarthenshire, Wales, his father, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, was 44 and his mother, Alice Montgomery, was 47. He married Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly about 1189. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. His occupation is listed as chief justice of ireland in Ireland. He died on 15 January 1204, in County Kildare, Ireland, at the age of 57, and was buried in Kildare, Edenderry, County Offaly, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly est né environ 1148, à Carmarthenshire, Galles, son père, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Alice Montgomery, avait 47 ans. Il a épousé Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly environ 1189. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est chief justice of ireland à Irlande. Il est décédé le 15 janvier 1204, à County Kildare, Irlande, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Kildare, Edenderry, County Offaly, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly um 1148 in Carmarthenshire, Wales geboren wurde, war sein Vater Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII 44 und seine Mutter Alice Montgomery 47. Er hat um 1189 Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. sein Beruf ist als chief justice of ireland in Irland aufgeführt. Er starb am 15. Januar 1204 im Alter von 57 Jahren in County Kildare, Irland und wurde in Kildare, Edenderry, County Offaly, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly è nato il circa 1148 nel Carmarthenshire, Galles, il suo padre, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Alice Montgomery, aveva 47 anni. Lui sposato Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly circa 1189. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. La sua occupazione è indicata come chief justice of ireland nel Irlanda. Morì il 15 gennaio 1204, nel County Kildare, Irlanda, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Kildare, Edenderry, County Offaly, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offalyが約1148年にウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIIIは44歳，母Alice Montgomeryは47歳であった。約1189年にEve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offalyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。アイルランドでの職業はchief justice of irelandと記録されている。彼は1204年1月15日にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアで57歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ オファリーイーデンデリーキルダアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly(이)가 대략 1148년 웨일스 카마테실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Montgomery(은)는 47세였다. 그는 대략 1189년 Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 아일랜드에서 chief justice of ireland이었다. 그는 1204년 1월 15일 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 파리 에데더리 킬더르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly nasceu aproximadamente 1148, em Carmarthenshire, Gales, seu pai, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Alice Montgomery, tinha 47 anos. Ele casou-se com Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly aproximadamente 1189. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Sua profissão aparece como chief justice of ireland em Irlanda. Ele faleceu em 15 de janeiro de 1204, em County Kildare, Irlanda, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Kildare, Edenderry, County Offaly, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly родился около 1148 г. в местности кармартеншир, Уэльс, его отцу по имени Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Montgomery, 47. Он женился на женщине по имени Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly около 1189 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.  Он работал по профессии chief justice of ireland в местности Ирландия. Он умер 15 января 1204 г. в местности коунти каилдар, Ирландия в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности каилдар, эдендирри, коунти оффали, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gerald FitzMaurice 1st Lord of Offaly nació aproximadamente 1148, en Carmarthenshire, Gales, su papá, Lord of Lanstephan Maurice FitzGerald De Whyte XVIIII, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Alice Montgomery, tenía 47 años. Se casó con Eve de Bermingham Valognes Lady of Offaly aproximadamente 1189. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Su ocupación registrada era chief justice of ireland en Irlanda. Murió el 15 de enero de 1204, en County Kildare, Irlanda, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Kildare, Edenderry, County Offaly, Irlanda.
